personal.name: Qamar Alkadi
personal.headline: Student builder exploring programming, AI, and web development.
personal.summary: I'm a student with a growing passion for technology and coding. I enjoy learning new skills and building projects that solve real-life problems.
personal.about: Currently, I'm exploring programming, AI, and web development while improving my problem-solving and creativity. I like hands-on projects that combine software with hardware and help me learn by building.
highlights: Focused on programming, AI, and web development.
Interested in practical projects that solve real-world problems.
Building skills across software, embedded systems, and computer vision.

education.details: Current student building skills in programming, AI, and web development.
Completed school studies before starting university in 2025.

experience.summary: Building practical projects while studying, with a focus on programming, AI, web development, and hardware-based systems.
highlights: Built robotics and computer vision projects using microcontrollers, Raspberry Pi, and Python-based tools.
Practiced problem solving through project-based learning and debugging across hardware and software.
Improved technical range by working on AI, web, and embedded system concepts.

projects.name: Robotic Arm (Adeept Kit)
projects.description: Designed and built a multi-axis robotic arm using servo motors and a microcontroller, with a functional gripper and coordinated movement control.

projects.name: Car Object Detection (Raspberry Pi)
projects.description: Developed a real-time object detection system using Raspberry Pi, a camera, OpenCV, and pre-trained models for vehicle detection on edge devices.

future_projects.name: AI Study Assistant
future_projects.description: A student-focused tool that helps summarize notes, support revision, and improve study flow.
future_projects.goal: Combine AI with practical daily learning.

future_projects.name: Personal Web Projects
future_projects.description: More portfolio and web app builds to improve frontend, backend, and UI skills.
future_projects.goal: Keep shipping projects and strengthen full-stack ability.
